name: GAIA-2
description_en: Wayve's second-generation controllable driving world model for synthetic scenario generation and autonomy evaluation.
description_zh: Wayve 第二代可控驾驶世界模型，用于合成场景生成与自动驾驶评测。
editorial_summary_zh: 把世界模型正式推向自动驾驶训练、验证和安全测试链路。
editorial_summary_en: Pushes driving world models into the training and evaluation stack for autonomy.
